column1: flow
puntinamappa -> suggerimento — type=associazione; label="contiene"; explanation="puntinamappa contiene suggerimenti".
puntinamappa -> suggerimento — type=associazione; label="contiene"
this diagram models a system for managing air quality data and associated suggestions.
the `puntinamappa` class represents a location with air quality data and contains a collection of `suggerimento` objects.
the `suggerimento` class represents a suggestion related to the air quality at a location.
the `categoria` attribute in both classes indicates the severity of the air quality.
schermata iniziale -> selezioniamo lo stato, la regione e la città — type=flow; label="seleziona"; explanation="initiates the process";
selezioniamo lo stato, la regione e la città -> viene effettuata la richiesta al server — type=flow; label="richiesta"; explanation="sends request to server";
viene effettuata la richiesta al server -> presenta i dati ritornati — type=flow; label="risposta"; explanation="receives and displays data";
selezioniamo la tua posizione attuale -> presenta i dati ritornati — type=flow; label="posizione"; explanation="displays current location";

schermata iniziale -> selezioniamo lo stato, la regione e la città -> viene effettuata la richiesta al server -> presenta i dati ritornati -> seleziona la tua posizione attuale -> presenta i dati ritornati
the diagram models the process of obtaining location data.
the process starts with an initial screen, then the user selects a location, a request is sent to a server, data is returned, and finally the user selects their current position.
the process repeats to display the current location.
mappa iniziale -> ricaricare i dati scrolling giu — type=flow; label="ricaricare i dati scrolling giu"; explanation="initiates the process of refreshing the map."

ricaricare i dati scrolling giu -> il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi — type=flow; label="il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi"; explanation="sends a request to the server for updated map data."
il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi -> mappa aggiornata — type=flow; label="mappa aggiornata"; explanation="updates the map display."
mappa aggiornata -> ricaricare i dati scrolling giu — type=flow; label="ricaricare i dati scrolling giu"; explanation="initiates the process of refreshing the map."
flow 1: mappa iniziale -> ricaricare i dati scrolling giu -> il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi -> mappa aggiornata
the diagram models the process of updating a map.
the process starts with an initial map, then requests updated data from a server, and finally displays the updated map.
the loop "ricaricare i dati scrolling giu" suggests a continuous refresh mechanism.
mappa iniziale -> premere il pulsante per i suggerimenti — type=flow; label="mappa iniziale"; explanation="starting point of the process."
premere il pulsante per i suggerimenti -> schermata suggerimenti — type=flow; label="premere il pulsante"; explanation="transition to the suggestions screen."
flow 1: mappa iniziale -> premere il pulsante per i suggerimenti -> schermata suggerimenti
this diagram models the process of navigating from an initial map to a screen displaying suggestions after pressing a button. it represents a simple, linear flow.

the user starts the application.
the airqualityactivity calls the airvisual api to load countries, states, and cities.
the mainactivity handles the data received from the api and presents it to the user.

the application starts with the airqualityactivity.
the application requests location permission from the user.
the mainactivity loads countries, states, cities, and locations sequentially from the airvisual api.
the application handles the data received from the api and presents it to the user.
the diagram shows a typical flow for retrieving location-based air quality data.
utente -> widget provider : onenable()
widget provider -> airvisual api : updateappwidget()
airvisual api -> widget provider : recupera i dati
widget provider -> utente : presenta i dati all'utente
the diagram models the interaction between a user, a widget provider, and an air visual api to update and display data.
the user initiates the process by calling `onenable()` on the widget provider.
the widget provider then requests data from the airvisual api using `updateappwidget()`.
finally, the widget provider presents the retrieved data to the user.

the diagram models a sequence of events where a user requests a map view, the map activity requests data from the airvisual api, and the web view displays the updated data to the user. the process involves a refresh of data from the api.

the diagram models a process where a user provides location information, which is then used to retrieve relevant tips from an faq system. the system returns the data to the user.
